---
title: "R Resources"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title { margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
</style>

<p class="page-intro">
  A curated set of references used throughout ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications.
  These resources cover the R programming ecosystem, the tidyverse, and modern data visualisation practices.
</p>

<!-- Getting Started -->
<div class="resource-section">
  <div class="section-header" style="margin-top:0;">
    <div class="section-dot handson"></div>
    <span class="section-label">Getting Started with R</span>
  </div>
  <div class="resource-grid">

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">📘</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://r4ds.had.co.nz/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">R for Data Science</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Garrett Grolemund &amp; Hadley Wickham. The definitive guide to the tidyverse —
          covers data import, wrangling, visualisation, and modelling workflows.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">📗</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://b-rodrigues.github.io/modern_R/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Modern R with the tidyverse</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Bruno Rodrigues. Practical introduction to modern R programming.
          <a href="https://b-rodrigues.github.io/modern_R/objects-types-and-useful-r-functions-to-get-started.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Chapter 2</a>
          offers a thorough overview of R data objects and types.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">📙</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://bookdown.org/ansellbr/WEHI_tidyR_course_book/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Introduction to R – tidyverse</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Brendan R. E. Ansell. A beginner-friendly course book focused on tidy data principles
          and practical data manipulation with dplyr and tidyr.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">📦</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://thomasadventure.blog/posts/install-r-packages/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Installing R Packages from CRAN, Bioconductor, GitHub and Co.</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Comprehensive guide to installing R packages from multiple sources,
          including common troubleshooting tips.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- Workflow -->
<div class="resource-section">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-dot inclass"></div>
    <span class="section-label">Workflow &amp; Best Practices</span>
  </div>
  <div class="resource-grid">

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">⚙️</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://hbiostat.org/rflow/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">R Workflow</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Frank Harrell's guide to reproducible, project-oriented R workflows —
          covers project structure, naming conventions, and literate programming.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="resource-card">
      <div class="resource-icon">✍️</div>
      <div>
        <a href="https://www.fharrell.com/post/rflow/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">R Workflow — Blog Post</a>
        <p class="resource-desc">
          Statistical Thinking blog by Frank Harrell. A readable summary of
          the R Workflow principles with practical advice for analysts.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
